How It Works

From inquiry to closing

1

Request a package

Email me on any property above. You'll get the full marketing package — floor plans, finishes, photos, and STR revenue comps.

2

Run the numbers together

I'll walk you through financing scenarios, projected NOI, and the permit picture for that specific jurisdiction.

3

Move before the market

Off-market and builder-direct deals don't wait for the MLS. When the fit is right, we write it.

Don't see the right fit?

Tell me your budget and goals — new inventory comes through my builder network every month.
